excerpt: And creation was made for the manifestation of the essence of the Prophetic Seal, Muhammad, the greatest blessing to mankind, with preparatory stages through the creation of Adam and all preceding prophets.
source_location_hint: doctrine of final prophethood and cosmological purpose

excerpt: Jesus was commanded to believe in Muhammad, and Muhammad declared: 'Had I not been sent, I would not have created Adam, nor Paradise and Hell. When I inscribed the shahada on My Throne, it became still.'

The world resembles corrupted air; man purifies it through aromatic and medicinal means while continuing to live within it, as he must continually combat satanic whispers through spiritual discipline.
source_location_hint: theory of moral rectification amid worldly corruption

excerpt: The Prophet instructed Abu Dharr: 'Consider yourself dead in this world. Speak little and remember Allah much. Love the poor and sit among them. Be content with simple sustenance. Do not covet the world, for it is the root of all sin.'
source_location_hint: prophetic counsel on renunciation and spiritual discipline

excerpt: Fever is a purification sent by a Merciful Lord, and afflictions erase sins for those who sin through ignorance without willful intent.
The Prophet declared: 'I am near to the broken-hearted,' indicating that sincere repentance following unintentional sin elevates the soul above pride and egoism.
source_location_hint: spiritual anthropology of the contrite heart
